nl_query: Which boards have a board coordinator who is also listed as a primary evaluator in the pool, and what is the total number of scripts that coordinator has evaluated versus coordinated?
failed_sql: SELECT b.id AS board_id, fc.name AS coordinator_name, COUNT(sa.id) AS scripts_evaluated, COUNT(hs.id) AS scripts_coordinated FROM board b JOIN board_coordinator bc ON b.id = bc.board_id JOIN faculty_cache fc ON bc.faculty_cache_id = fc.id JOIN script_assignment sa ON sa.faculty_cache_id = fc.id JOIN honorarium_summary hs ON hs.faculty_cache_id = fc.id WHERE fc.name = (SELECT ep.eligible_role FROM evaluator_pool ep WHERE ep.board_id = b.id AND ep.eligible_role = 'PRIMARY' AND ep.is_available = TRUE) GROUP BY b.id, fc.name
error: Validation failed (semantic): SQL applies COUNT(hs.id) but 'hs.id' is also a GROUP BY key. COUNT over a GROUP BY key is tautological: SUM returns the value itself, COUNT(DISTINCT) always returns 1. Use a different column for the aggregation, or restructure the query.
